narrative: Fed Chair Warsh prioritizes inflation at Sintra as WTI crude retreats on recovering Hormuz flows — gold higher +1.44%; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.14%; VIX 16.0. GBP/JPY bilateral divergence (+0.73% vs -0.65%) dominates G10 as BoE-BoJ 275bp carry anchors the 215.81 level; USD/JPY holds 162.44 despite moderate options put skew. EUR/USD retreats to 1.1384 as ECB-Fed 150bp spread and negative CESI data misses cap upside. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision at 02:00 UTC July 8.
